description: Pre-mapping of KiloCode-shipped CI workflows and scaffold artefacts to NIST SSDF (SP 800-218 v1.1) practices. When a project uses our scaffold, the matching practices auto-flip to status='implemented' with the listed paths as evidence.

autoPopulate.notes: For each entry below, the auto-populator checks every path in `evidence` against the workspace root. If at least one path resolves, the matching practice is set to status='implemented' and the resolved paths are written into the practice's evidence field.

mappings.title: Define Security Requirements for Software Development
mappings.rationale: PRD's NFR section + agent-spec.yaml capabilities define security requirements (anchor 1).

mappings.title: Implement Roles and Responsibilities
mappings.rationale: CODEOWNERS assigns review responsibility; SECURITY.md names the security contact.

mappings.title: Implement Supporting Toolchains
mappings.rationale: Automated CI, SAST, and Scorecard workflows shipped by the scaffold.

mappings.title: Define and Use Criteria for Software Security Checks
mappings.rationale: Gate thresholds (test pass-rate, scorecard >= 7.0, SLSA L3) are enforced in CI (anchors 2, 6, 7).

mappings.title: Implement and Maintain Secure Environments for Software Development
mappings.rationale: GitHub-hosted runners with pinned action SHAs and minimum token-permissions (anchor 7).

mappings.title: Protect All Forms of Code from Unauthorized Access and Tampering
mappings.rationale: SLSA L3 release pipeline + branch-protection template (anchor 6).

mappings.title: Provide a Mechanism for Verifying Software Release Integrity
mappings.rationale: Cosign keyless signing via OIDC + verify.sh local verifier (anchor 6).

mappings.title: Archive and Protect Each Software Release
mappings.rationale: Release workflow uploads SLSA provenance + cosign signature + SBOM as immutable release assets.

mappings.title: Design Software to Meet Security Requirements and Mitigate Security Risks
mappings.rationale: PRD threat-model section + ADR design rationale + OWASP LLM risk register (anchor 4).

mappings.title: Review the Software Design to Verify Compliance
mappings.rationale: ADR review process gated by CODEOWNERS.

mappings.title: Reuse Existing, Well-Secured Software When Feasible
mappings.rationale: Pinned lockfile + Dependabot config keep third-party components audited (anchor 7).

mappings.title: Create Source Code by Adhering to Secure Coding Practices
mappings.rationale: Lint + typecheck enforced in CI; secure-coding rules emitted by scaffold.

mappings.title: Configure Compilation/Build Processes to Improve Security
mappings.rationale: Hardened runner + pinned action SHAs + reproducible build flags.

mappings.title: Review/Analyze Human-Readable Code to Identify Vulnerabilities
mappings.rationale: CodeQL + Semgrep SAST scans on every PR.

mappings.title: Test Executable Code to Identify Vulnerabilities
mappings.rationale: OWASP ZAP DAST stub + Playwright E2E suite (anchor 3).

mappings.title: Configure Software to Have Secure Settings by Default
mappings.rationale: Scaffold ships defaults that fail-closed on auth/secret config.

mappings.title: Identify and Confirm Vulnerabilities on an Ongoing Basis
mappings.rationale: Dependabot + Scorecard + CodeQL run on schedule (anchor 7).

mappings.title: Assess, Prioritize, and Remediate Vulnerabilities
mappings.rationale: SECURITY.md publishes the SLA for severity-tiered remediation.

mappings.title: Analyze Vulnerabilities to Identify Their Root Causes
mappings.rationale: Postmortem template (one of the 28 canonical templates) drives root-cause analysis.
